data.body: Done. adapters.py now returns a structured Outcome{ok,code,error_type} (frozen dataclass, truthy iff ok) with is_concurrency keyed on CONCURRENCY_CODE=10. Library reads exc.returncode/type; CLI reads exit code (10->ConcurrencyError); MCP unwraps ToolError.__cause__ (the chained ConcurrencyError). Parity rejection tests now assert is_concurrency + code==10 + error_type=='ConcurrencyError', failing on wrong-reason rejects. test_mcp.py asserts the typed chained ConcurrencyError(returncode 10) not prose; added a not-found discrimination test. Temp-break verified red. Full interfaces suite green (116 across 2 orders).
